name: Barbecue Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Wrap ribs in double thickness of foil and bake for 1 1/2 hours at 350 degrees F.
2. Unwrap and drain drippings.
3. Combine all ingredients and pour over ribs.
4. Marinate at room temperature for 1 hour.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes, basting with sauce, or grill 30 minutes, turning and basting.
